title: Industry Benchmarks
gapGrossMargin: Improve gross margin by {gap}pp through better supplier negotiations, reducing waste, or repricing
gapNetMargin: Close the {gap}pp net margin gap by cutting low-ROI expenses or improving pricing
gapOpexRatio: Reduce operating expenses by {gap}pp of revenue through automation or renegotiating fixed costs
gapInventoryTurnover: Improve turnover by {gap}x through better demand planning and reducing slow-moving stock
gapFallback: Close the gap to reach industry average
askPrompt: Compare my business to {industry} benchmarks. My metrics: Gross margin {grossMargin}% (industry {gmLow}-{gmHigh}%), Net margin {netMargin}% (industry {nmLow}-{nmHigh}%), OpEx ratio {opexRatio}% (industry {opexLow}-{opexHigh}%). {gapSuffix} What specific actions should I take to reach the top quartile?
